title: Better 3D Blocks
description: A resource pack that add BETTER 3D to Minecraft objects, blocks and entities
body:
## ❓ What is Better 3D Blocks ?
Better 3D Blocks is a resource pack that changes Minecraft's 3D models to new ones, with better 3D (👀), while keeping the game's base textures

You can see example screenshots in the "Images" section of this page

## 📚 What do I need?
**Nothing**! Better 3D Blocks is vanilla, meaning you can play it on base Minecraft, or with mods.

❗ Optifine or Sodium are however recommended in order to avoid loss of FPS as much as possible

## 🎈 What makes it special ?
It tries to add as much 3D as possible, without distorting the game, and while retaining as many FPS as possible.

And also another thing that you will soon find out, it's a little thing that has never been seen before on these type of packs 🙄👀 (it's still in development)

## 🌌 Is it compatible with shaders?
Yes! Updates are regularly made to make it even more compatible with shaders.

For now, out of 11 shaders tested, it was compatible with all 11.

## ⚙️ Why so few updates?
The designer creates each model by hand, so it takes time, and he can't afford to live off of it so he has another job on the side.

In addition, each new model is designed and worked on to try to limit FPS losses as much as possible

## 👍 How can I help ?
You can encourage the creator to make more updates by donating via PayPal (click "Donate on PayPal"), or also share your opinions and ideas [by email](mailto:thb5309@gmail.com). Every message is read and has an impact on the pack!
